# Mfs

**Summary**: A stratigraphic surface representing the maximum extent of sea-level rise.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] identified the MFS within the D7 unit using planktic abundance and diversity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The MFS is marked by peak planktic abundances (e.g., Globuligerina) and high species diversity. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 82]])
